entries.content: transitive verb ① (incorporate) 使成为一体 shǐ chéngwéi yītǐ▸ to integrate sth into or with sth; 使某物与某物成为一体▸ to be well integrated with its surroundings 与环境融为一体 ② (blend, combine) 使融入 shǐ róngrù▸ to integrate sb into or with sth; 使某人融入某群体▸ to integrate two systems 合并两个系统 ③ Mathematics 求…的积分 qiú… de jīfēn ‹number, quantity, expression›
entries.label: A
entries.name: transitive verb

entries.content: intransitive verb 成为一体 chéngwéi yītǐ
entries.label: B
entries.name: intransitive verb
